mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`email_verification` (type, email, code, is_verified, is_used, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (#{type}, #{email}, #{code}, #{isVerified}, #{isUsed}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT `verification_id` AS verificationId, `type` AS type, `email` AS email, `code` AS code, `is_verified` AS isVerified, `is_used` AS isUsed, `expires_at` AS expiresAt, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`email_verification` WHERE email = #{email} AND code = #{code} AND type = #{type} LIMIT 1

SELECT `verification_id` AS verificationId, `type` AS type, `email` AS email, `code` AS code, `is_verified` AS isVerified, `is_used` AS isUsed, `expires_at` AS expiresAt, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`email_verification` WHERE `email` = #{email} AND `type` = 'REGISTER' AND `is_verified` = 1 AND `is_used` = 0 AND `expires_at` > NOW() LIMIT 1
